---
title: Validate metadata
---

You can check whether your metadata will pass BigPicture's validation **before**
you upload, using [`xmllint`](https://gnome.pages.gitlab.gnome.org/libxml2/xmllint.html)
and the official [BigPicture metadata schemas (metaflex)](https://github.com/imi-bigpicture/bigpicture-metaflex).
This applies to the XML files in the `METADATA`, `LANDING_PAGE`, and `PRIVATE`
folders.

## Install xmllint

`xmllint` ships with **libxml2**.

::: {.panel-tabset}
## Windows

Install libxml2 (which provides `xmllint`):

```powershell
choco install xsltproc
```

If you don't use Chocolatey, the libxml2 binaries are also available from the
[libxml2 Windows builds](https://www.zlatkovic.com/libxml.en.html).

## macOS

```bash
brew install libxml2
```

## Linux

```bash
sudo apt-get install -y libxml2-utils
```
:::

::: {.callout-tip}
## Verify

```bash
xmllint --version
```

You should see a `libxml2` version string printed (your version may differ).
:::

## Download the schemas (XSDs)

Download the XSD files for the metadata version you target. They are available
directly from the metaflex repository
([v1](https://github.com/imi-bigpicture/bigpicture-metaflex/tree/v1.0.0/src/) /
[v2](https://github.com/imi-bigpicture/bigpicture-metaflex/tree/main/src)), or
you can fetch them all at once with this script, which places them in an
`xsd-files/` folder:

```bash
version=v2  # replace with v1 for metadata version 1
mkdir -p xsd-files

curl -H "Accept: application/vnd.github.v3+json" \
  https://api.github.com/repos/imi-bigpicture/bigpicture-metaflex/contents/src?ref=$version.0.0 | jq -r '.[] | .download_url' |
while IFS= read -r url; do
    xsd_name=$(basename "$url")
    curl -o "xsd-files/${xsd_name%\?*}" -J -L "$url" >/dev/null 2>&1
done
```

::: {.callout-tip}
## Verify

```bash
ls xsd-files/
```

You should see a set of `BP.*.xsd` files, one per metadata type (for example
`BP.dataset.xsd`, `BP.image.xsd`, `BP.sample.xsd`).
:::

## Validate each XML file

For each metadata file, validate it against the matching schema:

```bash
xmllint --noout --schema xsd-files/BP.<filename>.xsd <filename>.xml
```

For example, to check `dataset.xml`:

```bash
xmllint --noout --schema xsd-files/BP.dataset.xsd METADATA/dataset.xml
```

::: {.callout-tip}
## Verify

A file that passes prints:

```
METADATA/dataset.xml validates
```

If you see schema errors instead, fix the reported lines and re-run before
moving on — these are the same checks BigPicture applies on its side.
:::

Once every metadata file validates, continue to [Upload (sda-cli)](upload.qmd).
